title: Flow drafting (mine a flow from data)
description: Meta-flow: ingests an event log's variant statistics and drafts a Flowstate routine flow, writing it to the library.

nodes.label: Receive event log
nodes.description: Inbound door: the mined activities + variant statistics.

nodes.label: Mine process model
nodes.description: Identify the dominant routine path and the exception forks.

nodes.label: Draft Flowstate flow
nodes.description: Emit a draft flow: deterministic spine + agent node on exceptions + a human gate.
nodes.prompt: Using the mined model, draft a Flowstate flow as nodes and edges. The routine path must be deterministic (action + decision nodes); route exceptions to an agent node, then a human gate (a channel bound to ui). Return the flow JSON.

nodes.label: Assemble draft
nodes.description: Name the drafted flow (the JSON itself is captured on the incoming edge, where the agent outcome is in scope).

nodes.label: Write draft to library
nodes.description: Outbound: persist the drafted routine flow.
